message:
feat(core): enhance synaptic and bio-inspired logic

- Update GPTSynaptic model structure and forward pass
- Refine synaptic split/merge mechanisms
- Improve neuroscore calculation
- Enhance neuroviz visualization capabilities
- Update fused kernels for genetics, metrics, and presynaptic computations

+def _maybe_import(module: str, attr: Optional[str] = None) -> Any:
+    spec = importlib.util.find_spec(module)
+    if spec is None:
+        return None
+    mod = importlib.import_module(module)
+    return getattr(mod, attr) if attr else mod
 
-try:
-    import plotly.graph_objects as go
 
-    _HAS_PLOTLY = True
-except Exception:

+PCA = _maybe_import("sklearn.decomposition", "PCA")
+_HAS_SKLEARN = PCA is not None
+go = _maybe_import("plotly.graph_objects")
+_HAS_PLOTLY = go is not None
